title: Getting Started with Civil Engineering
summary: An introduction to my journey in civil engineering and what inspired me to pursue this field. Learn about structural design fundamentals and urban planning.

title: Building Your First Website from Scratch
summary: A step-by-step guide to creating a responsive website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Perfect for beginners looking to get started with web development.

title: Modern Design Principles for Web Apps
summary: Explore contemporary design patterns, color theory, and user interface best practices that make websites stand out in 2025.

title: Database Basics Every Developer Should Know
summary: Understanding relational databases, SQL queries, and how to structure your data efficiently for scalable applications.

title: My Journey as a Multi-Skill Learner
summary: How I balance studying civil engineering with learning web development, app development, and graphic design. Tips for continuous learning.

title: Creating Mobile-Responsive Layouts
summary: Master the art of responsive web design with CSS Grid, Flexbox, and media queries. Make your websites look great on any device.
